data.evidence: Implemented daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md detection, latest daily first-item preference, top-level folder aggregation, vault_size_bytes stats; verified by npm run check and runtime_flow tests.

Implemented localStorage remembered vault + recent vault switcher, GB vault summary, non-redundant filename/path header, independent sidebar/document scroll CSS; verified by npm run check; Vite browser smoke blocked by missing Tauri invoke outside Tauri runtime.
Installed/validated repo-local .go state, wrote docs/vision.md and schema-valid docs/vision.json; repo-complete local check status JA; go validate/readback passed.

Root cause: linuxdeploy AppImage/FUSE plus AppDir icon basename mismatch. Fixed scripts/tauri-build.mjs to set APPIMAGE_EXTRACT_AND_RUN and repair Linux AppImage by copying expected icon basename then running linuxdeploy-plugin-appimage. npm run desktop:build exits 0 and writes target/release/bundle/appimage/Mega_Vault_Viewer-x86_64.AppImage (74M); npm run check exits 0.

Added GitHub Releases macOS install/update channel: release-macos workflow builds aarch64/x86_64 macOS app+DMG assets, scripts/install-macos.sh installs/updates latest release to /Applications, versions bumped to 0.1.1, docs/changelog updated. Verified npm run check, bash -n install script, node --check tauri-build, go validate, release workflow smoke.
Added docs/codex-macos-install-update.md as raw Codex handoff URL for macOS install/update; README links to it. Verified npm run check, bash -n install script, go validate.

Root cause: discover_vault_files read+hashed every file, including CAS blobs and Obsidian/runtime dirs, making sync scale with blob payload size. Fixed discovery to prune blobs/.obsidian/runtime/cache dirs and hash non-Markdown via metadata fingerprint while Markdown content remains content-hashed. Added sync_skips_cas_blob_payload_tree regression. Verified focused cargo test, cargo test --workspace, npm run check, go validate. Real broad vault topology probe timed out after 120s, confirming full traversal is too expensive.

Redesigned shell: removed permanent Local-first marketing copy, compact current vault chip, moved vault details behind right-rail disclosure, always-visible search, grouped Time/Data/Browse nav, compact right-rail calendar. Added JSON/JSONL search/read support and entity/project split from records/entities.jsonl vs records/projects.jsonl; removed wikilink fallback that leaked project IDs into entities. Verification: cargo test --workspace, npm run check, browser DOM/vision smoke with searchVisible=true navGroups=Time/Data/Browse localFirstVisible=false blank=false.

Implemented Obsidian-like daily note workflow: create/open daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md from missing calendar day; daily markdown opens in autosave edit mode; daily writes stamp last_updated; file_browser exposes last_updated, ai_processed_at, and ai_processed_status; calendar renders note + AI processed markers with green only when ai_processed_at >= last_updated. Verification: cargo test -p mvv-core creates_daily_notes_and_tracks_ai_processed_status --test runtime_flow, npm run check, go validate, browser DOM smoke blank=false searchVisible=true cssHasProcessed=true setupNoError=true.

Removed oversized top-left brand/setup chrome. Replaced large Mega Vault Viewer H1 with compact MVV/status bar; moved vault path into compact disclosure; shortened Open/Sync button to 34px compact action. Verification: npm --workspace apps/desktop run build, browser DOM smoke h1=[] brandHeight=26 titleFont=12px buttonHeight=34 setupHeight=77 blank=false, npm run check, go validate.

Frontend design/edit-mode fix complete. Edit mode now hides Item/Frontmatter/Links metadata chrome, document-pane uses edit-specific rows auto/minmax(0,1fr), document-body hides overflow, textarea owns scroll with dark scrollbar, footer is below editor without overlap, sidebar search/nav controls are smaller. Verification: npm --workspace apps/desktop run build; browser DOM forced edit smoke blank=false paneRows='67px 510px' bodyOverflow=hidden textareaOverflow=auto textareaScrollable=true footerOverlapsTextarea=false searchHeight=34 tabHeight=28; browser visual smoke; npm run check; go validate.

Moved edit-mode Save/Cancel from bottom editor footer into top document header action row. Footer now contains only path and save-state. Verification: npm --workspace apps/desktop run build; browser DOM smoke blank=false saveInHeader=true cancelInHeader=true footerButtonCount=0 saveAboveFooter=true; browser visual smoke; npm run check; go validate.
